note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 1: Mateo wakes up to a cryptic message from an unknown sender Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Voyager''s Whisper") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 2: Mateo tries to decipher the message, feeling uneasy Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Voyager''s Whisper") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 3: Mateo heads to work, lost in thought Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Voyager''s Whisper") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 4: Mateo starts his day at the office, checking emails and reports Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Voyager''s Whisper") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 5: Mateo's coworker, Javi, teases him about his lack of social life Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Voyager''s Whisper") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 6: Dr. Baeza briefs Mateo on a new project, involving an innovative encryption method Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Voyager''s Whisper") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 7: Mateo senses that Dr. Baeza is hiding something about the project Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Voyager''s Whisper") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 8: Mateo meets Zoë at a café, discussing their plans for the weekend Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Voyager''s Whisper") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 9: Chief Ortega summons Mateo to her office, regarding a sensitive matter Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Voyager''s Whisper") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 10: Mateo learns about a potential security breach in the company's system Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Voyager''s Whisper") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 11: Mateo starts investigating the breach, following a trail of digital clues Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Voyager''s Whisper") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 12: Mateo feels like he's being watched, noticing strange coincidences Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Voyager''s Whisper") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 13: Mateo tries to shake off the feeling of unease, but can't sleep Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Voyager''s Whisper") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 14: Mateo discovers a hidden message on his computer, hinting at a larger conspiracy Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Voyager''s Whisper") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 15: Mateo meets Marina, who's working late, and they share a laugh about their jobs Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Voyager''s Whisper") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 16: Mateo confronts Dr. Baeza about the hidden message and the project's true purpose Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Voyager''s Whisper") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.
